name: file_edit
description: Replace all occurrences of a literal string in a file

path.description: Relative path to the file to edit (must be relative, not absolute)

execution.command_template: awk -v old='{{old_string}}' -v new='{{new_string}}' '{ while (i = index($0, old)) { $0 = substr($0, 1, i-1) new substr($0, i + length(old)) } print }' '{{path}}' > '{{path}}'.tmp && mv '{{path}}'.tmp '{{path}}'
